summary: Implemented support ticket screens (list, create, detail with message thread and attachments) and warranty claim screens (list, file claim with order/product selection, defect description, photo upload, warranty period validation) with 26 widget tests

commands_run.command: flutter analyze lib/models/support.dart lib/providers/support_provider.dart lib/screens/support_screen.dart lib/screens/warranty_screen.dart test/support_warranty_test.dart
